description: Runs Kallisto to perform pseudoalignment (using a human or mouse transcriptome index) and gene-level aggregation
author: Edwin F. Juarez, Thorin Tabor, Edwin Huang
plan:
## Kallisto.Quant GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Kallisto.Quant is a GenePattern module that Runs Kallisto to perform pseudoalignment (using a human or mouse transcriptome index) and gene-level aggregation

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 15 parameters:
- Required: fastq.files, transcriptome, bias, include.overhang, read.direction, output.filename, bootstrap.samples, seed, quantify.reads, pseudobam, genomebam
- Optional: fragment.length, fragment.sd, gtf.file, chromosome.file

### 3. Command Line
```
/module/call_kallisto.sh <fastq.files> <transcriptome> <bias> <output.filename> <bootstrap.samples> <seed> <quantify.reads> <include.overhang> <read.direction> fl_<fragment.length> fsd_<fragment.sd> <pseudobam> <genomebam> gtf_<gtf.file> chr_<chromosome.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/kallisto\:v7

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: fastq.files
parameters.description: The fastq or fastq.gz files for RNA quantification using psuedoalignment. Link to how psuedoalignment works (https\://tinyheero.github.io/2015/09/02/pseudoalignments-kallisto.html)

parameters.name: transcriptome
parameters.description: Which transcriptome to use for the pseudoalignment.

parameters.name: include.overhang
parameters.description: Include reads where unobserved rest of fragment is predicted to lie outside a transcript

parameters.name: read.direction
parameters.description: For strand specific reads, first read forward, first read reverse or unspecified

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: The base name of the files to be created

parameters.name: fragment.sd
parameters.description: Estimated standard deviation of fragment length; values are estimated with paired end data, but are required when using single-end reads (float value)

parameters.name: pseudobam
parameters.description: Save pseudoalignments to transcriptome to a BAM file

parameters.name: genomebam
parameters.description: Project pseudoalignments to genome sorted BAM file

parameters.name: gtf.file
parameters.description: GTF file for transcriptome information, required for projecting pseudoalignments to genome sorted BAM file

parameters.name: chromosome.file
parameters.description: Tab separated file with chromosome names and lengths, optional for projecting pseudoalignments to genome sorted BAM file, but recommended
